pending_work.description: eng: pin @biomejs/biome as devDependency, add npm run lint script, update CI to use npm run lint and check cli.js syntax. Closes #34. Branch kanbanbot/eng-pin-biome-devdep-20260501. 79 tests pass, lint clean. Changes: add @biomejs/biome^2.4.13 to devDependencies, add lint script, update CI lint step and syntax check.
ci: replace fragile sleep 2 in smoke test with poll/retry loop. Branch kanbanbot/eng-ci-smoke-robustness-20260501. 79 tests pass. Changes: CI smoke test uses retry loop (15 x 1s) instead of sleep 2.

infrastructure_notes: PERSISTENT ISSUE (confirmed runs: 2026-04-10 through 2026-05-01 run #25214645800): safeoutputs MCP server unavailable. create_pull_request/add_comment/noop/missing_tool all fail with tool-does-not-exist. gh CLI also unauthenticated. No GitHub writes possible. Branches exist only locally. Maintainer action needed: ensure safeoutputs MCP server is enabled in kanbanbot workflow.
